"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\rsalib.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\rsalib.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\rsalib.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -shared -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -static -lpthread -o librsalib.dll -Wl,--out-implib,librsalib.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\rsalib.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\rsalib.dir\linkLibs.rsp
